stories.title: Invisible Zeher: Ghar ki Hawa ka Sach
stories.description: Teen invisible chemicals tumhari saans ko silently maar rahe hain — aur tumhe pata bhi nahi. Yeh hai asli hidden health danger.
stories.tags: air pollution, indoor toxins, carbon monoxide, benzene, formaldehyde, health danger

modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTION: Stomps left leg at 0s, raises fist at 2s, jabs finger at lens at 4s, spins 180 at 6s, snaps back forward at 8s, freeze lean at 9s REACTION: Slaps forehead at 5s, eyes bulge at 7s, stomps both legs at 9s, mouth stretches to max scream at end MOVEMENT STYLE: aggressive stomp CAMERA: smash push-in wide to extreme close SPEAKING TONE: furious elder scolding DIALOGUE: Carbon Monoxide bol raha hoon, abe chutiya, main blood mein oxygen se 200 guna zyada bind karta hoon, isliye 10 minute exposure mein hi brain hypoxia start ho jata hai
modules.image_generation_prompt: Carbon Monoxide stands wide-legged on a cracked Indian highway divider surface. Matte invisible gas visualized as faint smoky translucent waves with heat shimmer distortion. Rusted trucks and autos blur past behind, exhaust fumes mixing into hazy polluted air. Eyes deeply scrunched with thick cartoon brows, burning rage, whites visible. Tiny round button nose wrinkled. Right index finger jabbing at camera lens, left hand raised mid-gesture. Two short stubby legs spread apart, feet angled outward. Full body leaning fifteen degrees forward, mouth wide open screaming, back teeth visible, uvula showing. Cinematic rim light from behind, warm golden key light from forty five degrees. Deep shadows under chin and legs. Lens flare bursting from eyes. Air particles shimmer violently around body creating toxic distortion effect. Pixar 3D render 8K resolution hyper-detailed textures subsurface scattering cinematic lighting character screaming from inside its natural world no studio no plain background
